**质数** 是一个大于 1 的自然数，只有两个因子，1 和它本身。

**输出:** 2

因此，答案是 2。

**示例 3:**

**输出:** 3

**解释:**

- 由于无法进行传送，我们通过 `0 → 1 → 2 → 3` 移动。因此，答案是 3。

- `1 <= n == nums.length <= 105`

        spf = new long[maxNum + 1];
        for (int i = 2; i <= maxNum; i++) {
            if (spf[i] == 0) {
                spf[i] = i;
                for (int j = i * i; j <= maxNum; j += i) {
                    if (spf[j] == 0) {
                        spf[j] = i;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    public static long solve(long[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length;
        if (n == 0) return 0;

        // Build primeToIndices map
        Map<Long, List<Integer>> primeToIndices = new HashMap<>();

        for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) {
            long x = nums[j];
            if (x == 1) continue;

            Set<Long> primes = getUniquePrimes(x);
            for (Long p : primes) {
                primeToIndices.computeIfAbsent(p, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(j);
            }
        }

        // BFS
        int[] dist = new int[n];
        Arrays.fill(dist, -1);
        dist[0] = 0;

        Queue<Integer> queue = new LinkedList<>();
        queue.add(0);

        while (!queue.isEmpty()) {
            int i = queue.poll();
            if (i == n - 1) return dist[i];

            // Adjacent moves
            for (int next : new int[]{-1, 1}) {
                int nextIndex = i + next;
                if (0 <= nextIndex && nextIndex < n && dist[nextIndex] == -1) {
                    dist[nextIndex] = dist[i] + 1;
                    queue.add(nextIndex);

                    for (int j : targets) {
                        if (j != i && dist[j] == -1) {
                            dist[j] = dist[i] + 1;
                            queue.add(j);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return -1; // unreachable
    }

    private static boolean isPrime(long x) {
        if (x < 2) return false;
        if (x == 2) return true;
        if (x % 2 == 0) return false;
        for (int i = 3; i * i <= x; i += 2) {
            if (x % i == 0) return false;
        }
        return true;

        while (x > 1) {
            long p = spf[(int) x];
            primes.add(p);
            while (x % p == 0) {
                x /= p;
            }
        }
        return primes;
    }

            while (temp % p == 0) {
